title: ficus cuspidata f. angustifolia
intro: Ficus cuspidata f. angustifolia, also known as the Banyan fig, is a variety of fig tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ficus cuspidata f. angustifolia include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
